---
title: "Code"
bibliography: "assets/mypubs.bib"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

# R packages

[mbr](https://github.om/ntthung/mbr) (mass-balanced reconstruction): Paleoclimate reconstruction with mass-balance-adjusted regression [@Nguyen2020MultiProxy].

[ldsr](https://github.com/ntthung/ldsr) (Linear Dynamical System Reconstruction): Streamflow reconstruction using the linear dynamical system (LDS) model [@Nguyen2018Linear].

[shy](https://github.com/ntthung/shy) (Stochastic Hydrology): a set of utility functions to generate stochastc streamflow ensembles.

# Code repos

[multiproxy-mbr](hptts://github.com/ntthung/multiproxy-mbr): Code to reproduce the paper "Multi-proxy, Multi-season Streamflow Reconstruction with Mass-Balance Adjustments" [@Nguyen2020MultiProxy].

[paleo-asia](https://github.com/ntthung/paleo-asia): Code to reproduce the Monsoon Asia reconstruction paper [@Nguyen2020Coherent].

[Ping](https://github.com/ntthung/Ping): Code to reproduce the paer that reconstructs the Ping River streamflow using the LDS model [@Nguyen2018Linear].
